name: xstockstrat — Ingest Signal (Email / IMAP)

nodes.name: Email Trigger (IMAP)
nodes.notes: Configure IMAP credentials for the newsletter email account. Sets polling every minute for unread messages.

notes: Polls an IMAP mailbox every minute for newsletter emails (Unusual Whales, Dividendology, Pure Power Picks, MarketWatch, Simply Wall St.). Parses ticker and direction from subject/body, then POSTs to the ingest-signal webhook. Configure IMAP credentials in n8n Settings. Customize 'Parse Email Signal' node for each source's specific format.
